rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level signal routing bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model to avoid package qualification errors.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be scoped to match AADL component type or implementation boundaries.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference only visible ports and features in their respective scopes.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the input AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax.
Implementation-level bindings require placement within component implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level signal routing assumptions in component type annexes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE model repair and fusion patterns
